report.status: ALL SEQUENCES PAUSED — NO CHANGE SINCE MAY 22. PENDING CLIENT DATA REVIEW.

overview.bookingTrackingNote: Bookings are not currently tracked in the MMai system. A separate booking source (e.g., Calendly) would need to be integrated for this metric.
overview.dataFreshnessNote: All 3 sequences remain paused. Metrics are unchanged from Report #002 (May 22). Fresh step-level data pulled from platform on June 18, 2026.

deltaVsMay22.note: No change — all 3 sequences remain paused. Zero activity in the 26 days since May 22.

sequences.name: Home Inspection Buyers Sequence
sequences.note: 585 contacts queued. Paused per client request. 64.44% open rate on 225 sent.

stepMetrics.note: 21 SMS failures. 33 sent but 0 delivered — SMS integration may need review.

sequences.name: Real Estate Agent Referral Sequence
sequences.note: Highest open rate (91.73%). Paused per client request.

sequences.name: Real Estate Agent Referral Sequence - Apollo
sequences.note: Strongest click engagement (4.15% CR). Apollo-sourced. Paused per client request.

insights.title: No Activity in 26 Days — All Sequences Still Paused
insights.detail: Since Report #002 (May 22), no new sends, opens, clicks, or replies have occurred across any of the 3 sequences. All remain paused. The 585-contact Home Inspection Buyers pipeline remains completely untapped.

insights.title: Exceptional Open Rates Preserved
insights.detail: 607 unique opens across 732 total sends. Original referral leads at 91.73%, Apollo variant at 90.46%, and Home Inspection Buyers at 64.44% — all well above industry benchmarks.

insights.title: Apollo-Sourced Contacts Show Strongest Click Engagement
insights.detail: The Apollo variant delivers a 4.15% click rate (10 unique clicks) vs 0.75% on the original referral (2 clicks). Step-level data shows clicks concentrated in Email 1 (4) and Email 2 (4), tapering to 2 in Email 3.

insights.title: SMS Step Shows Delivery Issues
insights.detail: Home Inspection Buyers Step 1 (SMS): 80 executed, 21 failed (26.25% failure rate). 33 SMS sent but 0 recorded as delivered. SMS integration may need troubleshooting before reactivation.

insights.title: 585 Contacts Queued — Largest Untapped Pipeline
insights.detail: 665 total members in Home Inspection Buyers with 585 not yet started — 88% of the sequence is untouched. This represents the single largest growth opportunity across all AAA Pro sequences.

insights.title: Zero Replies Across All Sequences
insights.detail: Despite strong open rates, no replies have been received across any sequence. Consider A/B testing subject lines or call-to-action language to drive engagement beyond opens.

nextSteps.action: Schedule client data review to discuss reactivation priorities
nextSteps.detail: Sequences have been paused for 26+ days. The 585-contact pipeline is aging. Client input is needed on when and how to resume.

nextSteps.action: Prioritize the 585-contact Home Inspection Buyers pipeline
nextSteps.detail: This is the largest untapped audience. Even a conservative 2% conversion rate would yield ~12 new inspection bookings.
Step 1 SMS shows 0% delivery rate (33 sent, 0 delivered) and 26% failure rate. The SMS integration (Twilio +15024311852) needs troubleshooting.

nextSteps.action: Apply Apollo variant's winning messaging to other sequences
nextSteps.detail: Apollo's Email 1 and 2 drive 4.6-4.8% click rates. Apply this messaging approach to the original referral sequence.
Zero replies despite 82.9% open rate suggests the current copy isn't prompting responses. Test direct questions or time-sensitive offers.
Bookings are not tracked in MMai. A Calendly integration would close the loop on attribution.

notes.clientRequest: All 3 sequences paused per client request — client reviewing performance data before reactivating.
